human.name: Human
human.description: Versatile and ambitious, humans are the most common race.

elf.name: Elf
elf.description: Graceful and long-lived, elves are attuned to magic and nature.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.description: Bold and hardy, dwarves are known as skilled warriors and craftsmen.

halfling.name: Halfling
halfling.description: Small but brave, halflings are resourceful and lucky.

half_orc.name: Half-Orc
half_orc.description: Fierce and enduring, half-orcs combine human versatility with orcish might.

gnome.name: Gnome
gnome.description: Curious and inventive, gnomes delight in discovery and creation.
